title: Tell an employee that they're not eligible for Statutory Neonatal Care Pay (NEO1)
body: "Before you start  Check the eligibility criteria for Statutory Neonatal Care Pay.  What you’ll need  You’ll need the:   details of the company details of the person responsible for dealing with the employee’s claim employee’s details, including their National Insurance number and address start date for the period that the employee is not eligible for Statutory Neonatal Care Pay, and the end date (if there is one)   Tell an employee  Get all of the information together before you start. You’ll fill this form in online and you cannot save your progress.  Start now  "
